_README: Finn's numbers for the INVESTOR deck. REAL = sourced from company sales deck (founder, customers, tech, ROI, pricing, problem). _assumed = placeholder, replace before sending. Raise amount/valuation are REAL (founder-confirmed). Run: node lib/investor.mjs
_assumed: Still estimates: traction.growthRate (22% MoM), netRevenueRetention (130%), useOfFunds split, raise.milestones (18-mo projected targets). REAL: MRR $5K, ARR $60K, 100K calls/mo, team 6, 6 deployments, raise $2M/$10M, founder, customers, tech, pricing, market.
oneLiner: Finn is the AI Voice Workflow Orchestrator — thousands of concurrent calls that reason, act, and write back to your systems in real time.

thesis.promise: Fewer missed conversations, lower cost, faster conversion

positioning: Not another voice agent — the workflow execution layer.

structuralGap.headline: Customer data does not act.
structuralGap.sub: Companies have CRM, forms, calendars, tickets, payment systems, and customer records. But turning that data into actual customer conversations still depends on humans.

productFlow.headline: From lead to completed outcome — without human swivel.
productFlow.sub: One workflow, end to end. Same pattern across qualification, support, collections, COD verification, and surveys.

steps.d: Lead, missed call, form, ticket, or campaign list enters Finn with context.
Applies eligibility, priority, language, consent, time window, and fallback policy.
The AI agent calls or answers, adapts tone and pacing, handles interruptions.
Qualifies intent, handles objections, books slots, verifies details, or collects payments.
Writes structured outcomes back to the CRM, calendar, EMR, ERP, or ticketing tool.
Outcome data improves the next call, template, escalation rule, and config.

rows.v: Lead source · CRM history · customer intent

beachhead.why: Urgent, repetitive front-desk workflows — high call volume, measurable ROI.
beachhead.altWedges: Alt wedges: fintech collections/onboarding · e-commerce COD verification · recruitment screening.
criteria: High pain — missed or delayed calls destroy revenue or throughput
Repeatable workflow — same playbook across customers, enabling templates
Measurable ROI — bookings, containment, collections, conversion easy to quantify
Expansion path — land in one workflow, then add reminders, support, follow-up, collections, surveys
Defensibility — compliance, call data, escalation rules, integrations become sticky over time

raise.timeline: ~18 months runway to Series A metrics
raise.thesis: The round buys de-risking, not buzzwords — tied to measurable milestones.

problem.headline: The crippling cost of manual call handling
points: Missed call = lost revenue — businesses mishandle ~25% of inbound calls, losing high-value leads.
High cost & slow — traditional voice support runs >₹200/min; BPO/IVR rollouts take 3–6 months.
Poor CX & churn — long holds and rigid menus drive customers away; US businesses lose ~$75B/year to bad phone service.

traction.headline: Strong outcomes, early monetization
traction.bridge: Pilots ran deliberately under-priced to prove outcomes. Now converting to paid contracts — the proof is ahead of the revenue.
outcomeMetrics: Frinks AI: 70% of support calls contained

proof.quote: Call abandonment down to 5% from ~30%. 75–80% of inbound calls fully handled. 24/7 AI coverage replaced 80+ offshore agents.
proof.author: Shikha Chouksey

proof.quote: 70% of production-support calls now contained. 800+ man-hours saved every month. Wait time under 30 seconds.
proof.author: David Johnson

proof.quote: Conversion rate up from 65% to 82%. Agent workload reduced 40%. Lead response under 2 minutes.
proof.author: Ayush Pateria

roiProof.label: payback — break even in 60–90 days; 331% ROI over 3 years
qualified leads vs human agents; 25% higher call success
lower cost per call; ~₹4.2L/mo saved per client

tech.name: Voice Workflow Orchestrator™
tech.stack: Streaming ASR + LLM + TTS · 46 languages live · 100+ voices
tech.scale: Scales to 100K+ calls/day capacity · 99.9% SLA · multi-tenant
tech.compliance: HIPAA · GDPR · SOC 2 · data residency · per-call audit

pricing.model: Wallet-based — top up once, pay per AI credit. Credits never expire
pricing.pilot: 50 free AI credits at signup · phone numbers ₹400 / $5 each, billed separately

stages.prove: Charge for orchestration, integrations, analytics, compliance, and voice minutes.
Package by use case: booked appointments, qualified leads, resolved support, recovered payments.
Move from cost-per-minute to price-per-business-outcome as attribution improves.
COGS/min, gross margin, implementation hours, support burden, CAC payback, NRR.

unitEconomics.note: Payback ~72 days avg across live deployments.

market.samLabel: AI + Voice + Automation infra for call handling, 2025
market.framing: $444B global contact center market ripe for agentic disruption

segments.name: Global Contact Center Market
segments.note: A vast, fragmented greenfield ripe for AI transformation.

segments.name: Contact Center Software Market
segments.note: AI tools poised to transform customer service.

segments.name: Voice AI Market
segments.note: Explosive growth driven by enterprise demand.

market.adoption: 27.3% of enterprises have AI tools in customer service, but voice-agent deployments remain <5%.

founders.name: Digvijay Shekhawat
founders.cred: LNM IIT. Co-founded CreepEx (NLP chat game, 100K+ downloads pre-ChatGPT). Led Product at BrightClass — voice & vision AI adopted by 10,000+ institutions. CPO at Snazzy (YC '21).

journey.title: Early conversational AI
journey.detail: CreepEx: NLP-driven interactive game with human-like dialogue, 100K+ organic downloads — pre-ChatGPT.

journey.title: Enterprise AI at national scale
journey.detail: Led Product at BrightClass: voice & vision AI adopted by 10,000+ institutions, six-figure revenue.

journey.title: Problem surfaced at YC
journey.detail: CPO at Snazzy (YC '21): saw experts waste weeks on manual lead verification & scheduling — repeatable across industries.

journey.title: Built Finn to fix it
journey.detail: Founded Finn to automate routine calls with no-code AI voice agents, freeing experts for high-impact work.

team.keyHires: Post-raise: senior voice/ML engineer, founding account executive, customer-success lead

matrix.edge: Customer still builds workflows, integrations, QA, escalation, and compliance.
Less focused on packaged vertical outcomes and system writeback.
Tied to incumbent clouds; not optimized for cross-system phone execution.
Expensive, inconsistent, hard to scale for spikes and long-tail workflows.
Rigid menus, poor customer experience, slow workflow changes.

competition.moatTagline: The LLM is not the moat. The moat is the workflow system around it.
competition.moat: A Voice Workflow Orchestrator™ that reasons, acts, and writes back to systems in real time — not a single-turn bot. Sub-400ms voice loop, 46 languages, function-calling + RAG in-call, live human handoff, 100K+ calls/day at 99.9% SLA, HIPAA/GDPR/SOC 2.

whyNow: Real-time LLMs crossed the latency + reasoning threshold for live phone calls. 27.3% of enterprises adopted AI in customer service, yet <5% run voice agents — the wedge is open now, before incumbents retool.
visionHeadline: From AI voice workflows to Tele-CRM.
vision: Every enterprise phone line becomes an autonomous agent that closes the loop end to end — the system that turns customer records into revenue actions.
